name: Hybrid Model: Extract JSON Fields
description: Promote frequently queried JSON fields to typed columns while keeping remaining fields in a JSON details column

checks.name: fact_web_events has 5 rows
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_web_events;

checks.name: All URLs extracted (no NULLs)
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_web_events WHERE url IS NULL;
checks.description: The url field must be extracted from JSON into a typed column for all rows

checks.name: 4 mobile events
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_web_events WHERE device = 'mobile';
checks.description: Events E1, E2, E4, E5 have device=mobile

checks.name: 2 events have campaign_id in details
checks.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM fact_web_events WHERE json_extract_string(details, '$.campaign_id') IS NOT NULL;
checks.description: Events E1 and E3 have campaign_id in their remaining details JSON
